task_completion.description: Verify that the GCompris application is open and the 'Piano Composition' activity is active.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The GCompris window is visible, displaying a piano keyboard at the bottom and a musical staff (treble clef) above it.

task_completion.description: Verify that the first note, C, has been played.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A musical note is visible on the first ledger line below the treble staff.

task_completion.description: Verify that the second note, D, has been played.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A musical note is visible in the space just below the first line of the treble staff, positioned to the right of the C note.

task_completion.description: Verify that the third note, E, has been played.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A musical note is visible on the first (bottom) line of the treble staff, positioned to the right of the D note.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fourth note, F, has been played.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A musical note is visible in the first (bottom) space of the treble staff, positioned to the right of the E note.

task_completion.description: Verify that the fifth note, G, has been played, completing the sequence.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A musical note is visible on the second line from the bottom of the treble staff, positioned to the right of the F note. The staff should show the ascending sequence C-D-E-F-G.

task_completion.description: Verify that a screenshot of the activity was saved to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window shows a command executing a screenshot capture to '/tmp/piano_result.png' (e.g., using scrot, gnome-screenshot, or ImageMagick), or a file manager shows the saved file at the correct path.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the genuine GCompris application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard GCompris Piano Composition activity, not a web browser image search, image editor, or mock-up.

integrity.description: Verify that the notes were played using the GUI piano keys.
integrity.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor is seen interacting with the white piano keys on the screen, rather than the agent using a script or terminal command to bypass the UI and generate the final image.

integrity.description: Verify that the screenshot saved is a genuine capture of the agent's workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot command captures the actual screen state showing the completed task, rather than downloading an existing image of a C major scale from the internet.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected activity is 'Piano Composition' in GCompris. The correct sequence of notes to be played and displayed on the musical staff is C, D, E, F, G (the first five white keys on the piano, ascending). The final screenshot must be saved to the exact path '/tmp/piano_result.png'.
